message:
feat(chrome): register hit regions for overlays and status bar toggles (bd-iuvb.17.4)

Wire up frame.register_hit_region for all chrome overlays and status bar
toggle elements so they can be clicked via the mouse dispatcher:

- Status bar: help, palette, a11y, perf, debug, mouse toggle hit regions
- Help overlay: close button + content area hit regions
- A11y panel: click-to-dismiss hit region
- Tour overlay: click-to-stop hit region
- Perf HUD / Debug / Evidence overlays: click-to-dismiss hit regions

Fix API compatibility in hook-generated tests (hit_grid→frame.hit_test,
id.raw→id.id, StatusToggle→StatusToggle(u32)).

Add chrome_hit_regions_e2e integration tests verifying hit region
registration and classify_hit routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
